title: Yule Log
overview: Two friends take their buddy to a secluded cabin to take his mind off the recent loss of his wife. What they don't expect is a night of terror after they unknowingly burn wood from a tree that has grown from a mound once used to burn a powerful witch! The cursed timber re-awakens dark spirits and creatures, forcing them, and a stranded woman, to fight for their lives during the Night of Mothers. This Yule Log burns forever, in hell!
